<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Aldar QR Code Generator</title>
<link rel="icon" href="https://www.aldar.com/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon" sizes="32x32"/>  
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/qrcodejs@1.0.0/qrcode.min.js"></script>
<style>
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body {
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    background: #f0f0f0;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 40px 20px;
  }
  .container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 680px;
    background: #fff;
    padding: 40px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  }
  h2 { text-align: center; font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 28px; color: #111; }
  label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; color: #444; display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  input[type="text"] {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 13px 14px;
    font-size: 15px;
    border: 1.5px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color .2s;
  }
  input[type="text"]:focus { border-color: #000; }
  .btn-row { margin-top: 16px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  button {
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: bold;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    transition: background .2s;
  }
  .btn-generate { background: #000; color: #fff; }
  .btn-generate:hover { background: #222; }
  .btn-dl { background: #e8e8e8; color: #000; }
  .btn-dl:hover { background: #d0d0d0; }
  .btn-dl:disabled { background: #f0f0f0; color: #aaa; cursor: not-allowed; }
  #status { margin-top: 14px; font-size: 13px; color: #555; min-height: 18px; text-align: center; }
  #status.error { color: #c00; }
  #status.success { color: #1a7a1a; }
  #qr-wrapper { margin-top: 30px; display: flex; justify-content: center; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container">
  <h2>Aldar QR Code Generator</h2>
  <label for="url">Paste the URL</label>
  <input type="text" id="url" placeholder="https://cloud.communication.aldar.com/..." />
  <div class="btn-row">
    <button class="btn-generate" onclick="generateQR()">Generate QR</button>
    <button class="btn-dl" id="btnPNG" onclick="downloadPNG()" disabled>⬇ Download PNG</button>
    <button class="btn-dl" id="btnSVG" onclick="downloadSVG()" disabled>⬇ Download SVG</button>
  </div>
  <div id="status"></div>
  <div id="qr-wrapper">
    <canvas id="qr-canvas" style="display:none;"></canvas>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  const QR_SIZE = 500;
  const LOGO_DATA_URI = "data:image/png;base64,";
  let currentURL = "";
  let finalCanvas = null;

  function setStatus(msg, type = "") {
    const el = document.getElementById("status");
    el.textContent = msg;
    el.className = type;
  }

  function generateQR() {
    const url = document.getElementById("url").value.trim();
    if (!url) { alert("Please enter a URL."); return; }
    try { new URL(url); } catch(e) { alert("Please enter a valid URL (include https://)."); return; }

    currentURL = url;
    finalCanvas = null;
    document.getElementById("btnPNG").disabled = true;
    document.getElementById("btnSVG").disabled = true;
    setStatus("Generating QR code…");

    // Step 1: render QR into a temp div
    const tempDiv = document.createElement("div");
    tempDiv.style.position = "absolute";
    tempDiv.style.left = "-9999px";
    document.body.appendChild(tempDiv);

    new QRCode(tempDiv, {
      text: url,
      width: QR_SIZE,
      height: QR_SIZE,
      colorDark: "#000000",
      colorLight: "#ffffff",
      correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
    });

    setTimeout(() => {
      const srcCanvas = tempDiv.querySelector("canvas");
      if (!srcCanvas) {
        setStatus("QR generation failed. Try again.", "error");
        document.body.removeChild(tempDiv);
        return;
      }

      // Step 2: composite QR + logo onto output canvas
      const out = document.createElement("canvas");
      out.width  = QR_SIZE;
      out.height = QR_SIZE;
      const ctx = out.getContext("2d");

      // Draw QR
      ctx.drawImage(srcCanvas, 0, 0, QR_SIZE, QR_SIZE);
      document.body.removeChild(tempDiv);

      // Step 3: draw logo centered
      const logo = new Image();
      logo.onload = () => {
        // Logo occupies ~22% of QR width, keeping aspect ratio square (logo PNG is square)
        const logoSize = Math.round(QR_SIZE * 0.22);
        const logoX = (QR_SIZE - logoSize) / 2;
        const logoY = (QR_SIZE - logoSize) / 2;

        // White padding behind logo
        const pad = 6;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.fillRect(logoX - pad, logoY - pad, logoSize + pad * 2, logoSize + pad * 2);

        // Draw logo image
        ctx.drawImage(logo, logoX, logoY, logoSize, logoSize);

        // Show preview on page canvas
        const previewCanvas = document.getElementById("qr-canvas");
        previewCanvas.width  = QR_SIZE;
        previewCanvas.height = QR_SIZE;
        previewCanvas.style.display = "block";
        const pCtx = previewCanvas.getContext("2d");
        pCtx.drawImage(out, 0, 0);

        finalCanvas = out;
        document.getElementById("btnPNG").disabled = false;
        document.getElementById("btnSVG").disabled = false;
        setStatus("QR code ready ✓", "success");
      };
      logo.onerror = () => setStatus("Logo failed to load.", "error");
      logo.src = LOGO_DATA_URI;
    }, 200);
  }

  function downloadPNG() {
    if (!finalCanvas) { alert("Generate a QR code first."); return; }
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.download = "Aldar-QR.png";
    link.href = finalCanvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    link.click();
    setStatus("PNG downloaded ✓", "success");
  }

  function downloadSVG() {
    if (!finalCanvas) { alert("Generate a QR code first."); return; }
    const dataURL = finalCanvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    const svgContent = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"
     width="${QR_SIZE}" height="${QR_SIZE}" viewBox="0 0 ${QR_SIZE} ${QR_SIZE}">
  <image width="${QR_SIZE}" height="${QR_SIZE}" xlink:href="${dataURL}"/>
</svg>`;
    const blob = new Blob([svgContent], { type: "image/svg+xml" });
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.download = "Aldar-QR.svg";
    link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    link.click();
    setStatus("SVG downloaded ✓", "success");
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
